releaseNotes: New Pro Subscription Experience: A completely redesigned subscription page with glowing animations and a premium dark theme!
New Sound & Music Packs: Customize your experience with 7 new music tracks and an updated Dog Sound Pack!
Library Activation: Manage your purchased sound packs and music directly in your library.
Unified Library: View Shop Items, Notes, Drawings, and Challenges in one place!
New Toast Notification System: Replaced boring alerts with smooth, bubbly popups.
Improved Saving: Fixed issues with saving challenges and notes to the library.
Haptic Feedback: Added vibrations for a more premium feel when deleting items.
Bug Fixes: Resolved type errors and improved data persistence across the app.
